message:
feat(engine): add deep enrichment tests for interference guard and slot registry

Add 208 new integration tests across two modules:

- controller_interference_guard (77 tests): timescale boundary
  conditions, multi-finding accumulation, implicit access grants,
  decision ID structure, write ordering semantics, subscription
  determinism, read snapshot edge cases, log event invariants,
  boundary values, stress/determinism

- slot_registry (131 tests): SlotId boundary values, authority
  envelope composition, promotion status Display, demote-promote
  cycles, lineage artifact validation, GA guard verification,
  replacement progress edge cases, large-scale stress, serde
  round-trips, error Display exactness, Copy/Default traits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
